title: How Cursor builds agentic workflows across the SDLC
summary: Tido Carriero (VP of Engineering, Cursor) discusses how Cursor builds agentic workflows across the entire software development lifecycle to break past the 40% productivity plateau seen in traditional AI coding assistants. The talk covers agent systems for bug triage, security review, growth experiments, and organizational implications.
